hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command"); echo "$cmd" | grep -Eiq "co-authored-by:[[:space:]]*claude" && printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Blocked by repo hook: commit message contains a Co-Authored-By: Claude trailer. Remove the trailer and retry the commit."}}' || true

bodies=$(git log @{u}..HEAD --format=%B 2>/dev/null || git log -n 20 --format=%B); echo "$bodies" | grep -Eiq "co-authored-by:[[:space:]]*claude" && printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Blocked by repo hook: one or more unpushed commits contain a Co-Authored-By: Claude trailer. Run noclaude in this repo to rewrite history, then retry the push."}}' || true
